visual_findings: The first evidence-contract rewrite spilled the conclusion into the top of the Limitations column.
The accepted rewrite keeps the complete Conclusion in the left column of page 9.
Limitations starts cleanly at the top of the right column on page 9.
Page 10 keeps Figure 4, Ethical Considerations, and References readable and non-overlapping.
change_summary: Reframed noMDL conversion in Discussion as a visible intervention rather than a converter-quality claim.
Changed the material-effect paragraph from a negative shortcut warning to a positive auditable-claims boundary.
Rewrote the Conclusion around a reusable evidence contract while preserving the no-ranking, no-speedup, and no-broad-robustness boundary.

verification.command: rg -n "Overfull|Float too large|too large|LaTeX Warning: Float|Rerun to get|Warning:.*Label|Undefined references|multiply defined|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log || true

residual_risk: This is a focused main-paper prose and p9-p10 visual pass, not a final upload gate or integrity-fingerprint refresh.
